steps.description: Click the "Declarative Agent" option in the "New Project" dialog dropdown within Visual Studio Code to start creating a new agent with declarative instructions.
Click the "Add an Action" option in the "Create Declarative Agent" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Start with a New API" dropdown option in the "Create an Action" prompt within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Microsoft" option in the "Select an authentication type" dropdown within the Authentication Type dialog in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension for Visual Studio Code.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown within Visual Studio Code's command palette.
Click the "Default folder: /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects" option in the "Workspace Folder" dropdown in Visual Studio Code.
